description: During an emergency drill, a safety officer needs to get a headcount of all personnel at the designated muster points.

nodes.task_description: Access the site access control system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent opens the personnel tracking dashboard.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all personnel who badged into the site today.

expected_outcome.expected: The system shows 250 people are currently on site.

nodes.task_description: Use the system to check off personnel as they arrive at the muster points, identifying anyone who is still unaccounted for.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent performs the roll call and the system shows 248 people are accounted for, with 2 still missing.
